stories.title: USMNT shows it can play ugly, which is exactly wha...
stories.summary: Play pretty? Fine. Play nasty? No problem. This USMNT has the tools to deal with every situation, which is handy as it faces Belgium next without its top scorer.

stories.title: World Cup VAR review: Misapplied protocols leave B...
USMNT beats Bosnia for 1st WC KO win since '02
stories.summary: The USMNT beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 2-0 in the World Cup round of 32 on Wednesday night for its first knockout win since 2002.

stories.title: Sources: Brown heading to Philly in blockbuster
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown has a new home, with the Celtics agreeing to send their longtime star to the 76ers for Paul George, two first-round picks (2028, '31) and two second-round selections, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Wednesday.

stories.title: Balogun red-carded in USMNT clash with Bosnia
stories.summary: Folarin Balogun's star turn at this World Cup went sideways early in the second half Wednesday night, as the American forward was sent off against Bosnia-Herzegovina.
